title: Joint Task Force
summary: The first-responder organization commonly called the JTF, which attempts to contain the outbreak before SHD activation and later contributes veterans to survivor groups.

claims.text: Ubisoft's glossary describes the JTF as the first responders who attempt to contain the outbreak before Division Agents are activated.
Division Agents are sent to help the JTF regain control of the city.
Former JTF members later form part of the Peacekeepers in Lower Manhattan.

paragraphs.text: The JTF represents the conventional first response to the outbreak. When containment fails, SHD Agents are activated to reinforce the effort rather than replace the JTF's existence in the setting.
JTF experience persists through veterans who join the Peacekeepers after surviving the extended crisis.

verification.notes: Command structure, named officers and regional JTF operations require direct mission and collectible evidence.
